_comment: Machine-checkable 翻译腔 / AI-味 phrase blacklist. The narrative rationale lives in common/style_patterns.md §3; this file is the DATA form so a tool can enforce it instead of a humanizer/LLM reading markdown and missing hits. Consumed by tools/citation_audit.py and tools/aesthetic_audit.py via --banned-phrases. Each entry: phrase (exact substring, case-insensitive for Latin), level (FAIL|WARN), reason (why it reads AI/翻译腔), suggest (what to write instead). Matching is naive substring — so only phrases that are almost always wrong are FAIL; ambiguous ones that have legitimate uses (深入, 直白, 更稳, 影子) are WARN so they surface for a human without hard-blocking. Single-char calques the reviewer flagged (炸 / 硬 / 吃-as-use) are intentionally omitted: substring-matching them would fire on 爆炸 / 硬件 / 吃饭 — enforce those by eye. This list is a self-improvement-loop asset: append a phrase (with reason + suggest) every time a shipped piece reveals a new tell.

phrases.suggest: 直接说那件事，删掉这个开场
给读者一个视角，别做总结陈词
同上，删掉或换成一句有信息量的收束
换成具体的递进内容或另起一句
拿出证据，让读者自己无疑

phrases.reason: 「在当今快速发展的…」式开场，一眼 AI
phrases.suggest: 用一个本周才成立的具体事实开场
说清到底带来了什么能力
做 / 建 / 写 / 搭
顺畅 / 不用手动切换 / 直接接上
说清具体动作，别喊口号

phrases.reason: 已带贬义/反讽，别用来形容温馨治愈画面
phrases.suggest: 治愈系 / 松弛感 / 温柔的氛围
风险更低 / 不容易翻车 / 先保留人工确认
这次最实用的 / 真正好用的是 / 最值的一点
离普通人很远的东西 / 只有开发者才碰得到的东西
删掉，直接说结论
删掉，直接说结论

phrases.reason: 常见 AI 副词，多为凑字
phrases.suggest: 说清到底深到哪一层，或删
用具体能力替代形容词
举出到底丰富在哪
风险更低 / 不容易翻车

phrases.reason: 误用于「操作简单」；直白只形容语言/表达
phrases.suggest: 很简单 / 超级简单

phrases.reason: 「带着你的影子」形容个性化产出偏虚
phrases.suggest: 带着你的审美
